message:
refactor(fsqlite): migrate compat layer and tests to Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> values

params.rs: update ParamValue assertions and u64/usize overflow
conversions to use .into() for Arc<str> SqliteValue::Text.

lib.rs: update all test row assertions, INSERT value vectors, and
expected result comparisons to .into() constructors.

migrate.rs: update migration test helpers.

compat_tests, insert_test, migration_tests: migrate all SqliteValue
constructors to match the Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> representation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
